svg.title: Synalux POS — payroll

svg.text: Daily OT: Day 5 exceeded 8h - 1.5x rate applied automatically. Verify daily punch log before approving.
Direct Deposit - Chase **6721 | Est. arrival May 26
CA Labor Code S510 -- Daily OT Calculation
Day 5 (Thu May 23): 9.5h worked - 8h regular + 1.5h OT @ 1.5x | Weekly total regular capped at 40h
